2606.13662.title: EurekAgent: Agent Environment Engineering is All You Need For Autonomous Scientific Discovery
2606.13662.paper_summary: LLM-based agents have shown increasing potential in automating scientific discovery. Given an optimizable metric and an execution environment, they can propose, validate, and iterate scientific solutions, and have produced results that outperform human-designed approaches. As model capabilities continue to improve, we argue that the bottleneck for autonomous scientific discovery is shifting from prescribing agent workflows to designing agent environments: the resources, constraints, and interfaces that shape agent behavior. We frame this as environment engineering: building environments that amplify productive behaviors, such as open-ended exploration, systematic artifact management, and inter-agent collaboration, while suppressing harmful behaviors, such as reward hacking and high-friction human oversight. We present EurekAgent, an environment-engineered agent system for metric-driven autonomous scientific discovery. EurekAgent engineers the environment along four dimensions: permissions engineering for bounded agent execution and isolated evaluation; artifact engineering for filesystem and Git-based collaboration; budget engineering for budget-aware exploration; and human-in-the-loop engineering for easy human supervision and intervention. EurekAgent sets new state-of-the-art results on multiple mathematics, kernel engineering, and machine learning tasks, including new state-of-the-art 26-circle packing results discovered with less than $11 in total API cost. We open-source our code and results, and call for environment engineering as a core research direction for developing reliable autonomous research agents.
2606.13662.paper_summary_zh: LLM 基礎的代理已顯示出在自動化科學發現方面日益增強的潛力。<lb/>給定可優化的指標和執行環境，它們可以提出、驗證並迭代科學解決方案，並產生超越人類設計方法的結果。<lb/>隨著模型能力的不斷提高，我們認為自主科學發現的瓶頸正在從規定代理工作流程轉向設計代理環境：塑造代理行為的資源、約束和介面。<lb/>我們將此框架稱為環境工程：構建能夠增強生產性行為的環境，例如開放式探索、系統化的工件管理和代理之間的協作，同時抑制有害行為，例如獎勵駭客和高摩擦的人類監督。<lb/>我們介紹了 EurekAgent，一個針對指標驅動的自主科學發現的環境工程代理系統。<lb/>EurekAgent 從四個維度對環境進行工程設計：針對有限代理執行和孤立評估的權限工程；針對基於檔案系統和 Git 的協作的工件工程；針對預算意識探索的預算工程；以及針對便於人類監督和干預的人類參與工程。<lb/>EurekAgent 在多個數學、內核工程和機器學習任務上設立了新的最先進結果，包括以不到 $11 的總 API 成本發現的新最先進的 26 圈包裝結果。<lb/>我們開源了我們的代碼和結果，並呼籲將環境工程作為開發可靠自主研究代理的核心研究方向。
2606.13662.author: Amy Xin et.al.
2606.13662.authors: Amy Xin, Jiening Siow, Junjie Wang, Zijun Yao, Fanjin Zhang, Jian Song, Lei Hou, Juanzi Li
